member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Abstraction.IEntityLoader.LoadAssociatedAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.EntityPublishInfo)
member.summary: Load for a given item in />

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Abstraction.IEntityLoader.LoadPrimaryAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo)
member.summary: Load for a given item in />

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1
member.summary: Represents a collection of DataUris and values stored in buckets based on the ID of the Item that DataUri refer to.
member.typeparam: The type of values in the dictionary

member.name: P:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.Item(Sitecore.Data.DataUri)
member.summary: Gets or sets the value associated with the specified DataUri key inside the bucket
member.param: The key of the value to get or set.
member.returns: The value associated with the specified key. If the specified key is not found a set operation creates a new element with the specified key.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.Add(Sitecore.Data.DataUri,`0)
member.summary: Adds the specified key and value to the dictionary.
member.param: The key of the element to add.
The value of the element to add. The value can be null for reference types.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.ContainsKey(Sitecore.Data.DataUri)
member.summary: Determines whether the collections contains the specified key.
member.param: The key to locate in the collections.
member.returns: true if the collection contains an element with the specified key; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.ContainsAny(Sitecore.Data.ID,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{Sitecore.Data.DataUri,`0},System.Boolean})
member.summary: Determines whether any element of the collection satisfies the condition.
member.param: The bucket id to search in.
A function to test each element for a condition.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.RemoveAll(Sitecore.Data.ID,System.Func{Sitecore.Data.DataUri,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Removes all the elements of the collection satisfies the condition under the given bucket id.
member.param: A function to test each element for a condition.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.First(Sitecore.Data.ID,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{Sitecore.Data.DataUri,`0},System.Boolean})
member.summary: Returns the first element of the collection that satisfies a specified condition under the given bucket id.
member.returns: A function to test each element for a condition.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.ExtractValues
member.summary: Projects each value of each bucket into an .
member.returns: An of all the values from all the buckets

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.ContentSync.DataUriBucketDictionary`1.TryGetValue(Sitecore.Data.DataUri,`0@)
member.summary: Get the value from dictionary

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Ack.IEdgePublishAckManager.StartAckProcessingAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Starts publishing acks

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Ack.IEdgePublishAckManager.CompleteAckProcessingAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Completes processing of ack messages

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Ack.IEdgePublishAckManager.GetNextAckBatchMessage(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Retrieves the next ack batch messagefrom the queue

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Ack.IEdgePublishAckManager.SendAckBatchStatusAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget,Sitecore.CH.Delivery.Publishing.Messages.Status)
member.summary: Updates Edge with the status of the processed message buffer

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Export.Schema.ISchemaExporter
member.summary: Provides a worker that exports GQL schema to the delivery channel

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Export.Schema.ISchemaExporter.Export(System.String,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Exports the graph schema for the given database to the delivery channel
member.param: The name of database to export schema for.
member.returns: Export task to track on completion.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.PublishEvent.IEdgePublishEvent.PublishSchemaSignalAsync(System.String,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Send a signal to notify about published schema changes

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.PublishEvent.IEdgePublishEvent.PublishEntitySignalsAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.EntityPublishInfo[])
member.summary: Send a signal to notify about published entity changes
member.param: The published entity with its references

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.PublishEvent.IEdgePublishEvent.PublishJobStartSignal(System.String,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Send a signal to notify about publishing job started

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.PublishEvent.IEdgePublishEvent.PublishJobEndSignal(System.String,Sitecore.CH.Delivery.Publishing.Messages.Status,System.String,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Send a signal to notify about job publishing ended

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Publish.Entity.IEntityPublisher
member.summary: Responsible of delivering the published entities to experience edge.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Publish.Entity.IEntityPublisher.PublishAsync(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.EntityPublishInfo)
member.summary: Publishes a single entity to experience edge.
member.param: Provides information about what to deliver.

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Publish.Schema.ISchemaPublisher
member.summary: Publish content GraphQL schema to the delivery platform

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Publish.Schema.ISchemaPublisher.PublishAsync(System.String,Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.PublishJobTarget)
member.summary: Publish content GraphQL schema to the delivery platform.
member.param: The content GraphQL schema as generated by content schema provider.

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Schema.ISchemaBuilder
member.summary: Builds content GraphQL schema

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Delivery.Schema.ISchemaBuilder.BuildSchema(System.String)
member.summary: Build content GraphQL schema for a given database.

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Dependencies.Compute.BaseItemDependencyCalculator.GetDependencyCollection(Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.Abstraction.Model.ItemPublishInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a dependency collection from the metadata

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Dependencies.Compute.BaseItemDependencyCalculator.EnsureDepdendencyCollectionDistinct(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Ensures there are no duplicate items in the depdencecy collection

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.CheckDeltaPublishBlock
member.summary: This block checks the delta publish status of an item using the IItemPublishComparisonStatus service if the item status is "DeltaUpdate". If the IItemPublishComparisonStatus service indicates the item is "dirty", the publish status will be changed to "Update", otherwise it is converted to "Skip"

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.CollectItemsToDeleteBlock
member.summary: When a published entity is deleted, children of the item need to be deleted. This block will generate the delete update messages needed to delete known published children
Recursively descend into the children of an item to determine which children to delete

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.CreateEntityBatchBlock
member.summary: This block collects an array of entity publish infos and merges them into a single entity batch publish info so they can be sent to Edge more efficiently

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.Dependency.AddLanguageDependenciesBlock
member.summary: This block creates publish messages for items in different languages that depend on the item being published for the values due to language fallback

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.Dependency.RemoveDuplicateItemsBlock
member.summary: This block removes items with the same ID and Language going to a specific publishing target. WARNING: This class MUST be single threaded. It is purposely designed as not thread safe. We are using an input buffer and relying on TPL threading to prevent concurrency in here.

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.LoadAssociatedEntitiesBlock
member.summary: This block creates any additional entities that need to be sent to edge along with the primary entity. These would be entities like layout entities or media entities.

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.LoadPrimaryEntityBlock
member.summary: This block loads an entity from the database based on the contents of the item publish info.

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.RemoveOutdatedAssociatedEntitiesBlock
member.summary: This block removes outdated entities from Edge

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.RemoveUnnecessaryDeletesBlock
member.summary: Check edge to see if an item exists. If it does, then it should be deleted otherwise the delete is skipped

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.UpdatePublishingStatusBlock
member.summary: This block processes the signal responses and updates publishing statistics

member.name: T:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.DirectPublish.Delivery.Export.Blocks.UploadMediaBlock
member.summary: This block looks for an updated or deleted media item and upload it. The media item is re-created with the URL to the uploaded media and passed along the pipeline

member.summary: Gets or sets the total count.

member.summary: Gets or sets the processed count.

member.summary: Clears all cached connections in the event an error occurs. This forces the next access to re-initialize the connections

member.summary: Disposes the resources used by this instance
member.param: True if called from Dispose(), false if called from the finalizer

member.name: M:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.Upload.XmcMediaClient.GenerateMediaLinkAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a media upload link for the specified file name, content type and content length
member.param: The name of the file to upload
The MIME type of the content to upload
The length of the content in bytes
member.returns: A response containing the upload link and file ID
member.exception: Thrown when the link generation fails or returns empty values

member.summary: Uploads file content to the provided MMS link
member.param: The MMS link to upload the file to
The binary content of the file

member.summary: Defines the possible states of a task instance.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Created
member.summary: The task has been created.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Pending
member.summary: The task is pending.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.InProgress
member.summary: The task is in progress.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Completed
member.summary: The task has been completed.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Failed
member.summary: The task has failed.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Stopped
member.summary: The task instance has been stopped.

member.name: F:Sitecore.ExperienceEdge.Connector.ContentHubDelivery.Infrastructure.XmcContent.Models.XmcContentTaskState.Waiting
member.summary: The task is waiting for an external event or callback.

member.summary: The item processing is completed.
